creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Namkhai B. from comment #12)

OK, that's done. 

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/local/etc/netdata # service netdata stop
Stopping netdata.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/local/etc/netdata # ls -hlrt
total 23280
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 21  2021 node.d
-rw-------  1 netdata  netdata    14M Mar  4  2022 apps.plugin.core
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   439B Nov 24  2022 netdata.conf
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 statsd.d
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 python.d
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 go.d
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root     wheel     8.1K Mar 13 01:57 edit-config
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 ebpf.d
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 custom-plugins.d
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 charts.d
-rw-r--r--  1 root     wheel      22B Mar 13 01:57 .install-type
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 ssl
drwxr-x---  2 netdata  netdata     2B Mar 13 01:57 health.d
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   397B Mar 13 01:57 netdata.conf.sample
-rw-r--r--  1 root     wheel       0B Mar 13 01:57 .opt-out-from-anonymous-statistics
-rw-------  1 netdata  netdata   315M Jun 17 13:36 netdata.core
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/local/etc/netdata # nano netdata.conf
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/local/etc/netdata # cd
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # service netdata start
Starting netdata.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # history 5
  2019  17:33   ls -hlrt
  2020  17:33   nano netdata.conf
  2021  17:34   cd
  2022  17:34   service netdata start
  2023  17:35   history 5
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # tail -n 4 /var/log/messages
Jun 18 17:34:27 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd apps.plugin[61951]: PROCFILE: Cannot open file '/usr/local/etc/netdata/apps_groups.conf'
Jun 18 17:34:56 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: sonewconn: pcb 0xfffff80032107c00 (local:/var/run/devd.seqpacket.pipe): Listen queue overflow: 1 already in queue awaiting acceptance (60 occurrences), euid 0, rgid 0, jail 0
Jun 18 17:35:41 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd apps.plugin[61951]: heartbeat clock: woke up 1096383 microseconds later than expected (can be due to system load or the CLOCK_REALTIME set to the future).
Jun 18 17:35:57 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: sonewconn: pcb 0xfffff80032107c00 (local:/var/run/devd.seqpacket.pipe): Listen queue overflow: 1 already in queue awaiting acceptance (60 occurrences), euid 0, rgid 0, jail 0
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ #
